brandName: ABC Comfort Heating and Air Conditioning

client.label: Customer side
client.blurb: Ask what a homeowner or business would ask
client.greeting: Hi, glad you stopped by. We handle heating, cooling, and ventilation for homes and small commercial across the region. What is going on with your system today?
chips: No heat and it is freezing outside
How much does a new furnace cost?

professional.label: HVAC side
professional.blurb: See how this would work on your own website
professional.greeting: Hey, take a look around. This is a working intelligent chat system built for HVAC shops. It handles inbound around the clock, screens the timewasters, books real service calls, and flags no-heat and gas-smell emergencies fast. Ask me how any piece of that works.
chips: How does it handle no-heat emergencies?
Can it screen tire-kickers before dispatch?
How does the booking flow work?
What does it cost to set up?
